use_cases: Visualizing conversion rates across sales pipeline stages
Tracking customer journey drop-off points in funnels
Displaying incident response workflow reduction metrics
Analyzing user engagement stages from acquisition to resolution
ai_summary: A dark-to-light purple gradient funnel chart component for visualizing conversion or reduction flows across sequential stages. Built on the Reaviz library with custom styling including glow effects and rounded container design. Displays metrics like event-to-resolution pipelines with interactive tooltips on hover, commonly used in SaaS dashboards for tracking user journeys or incident response workflows.
